title: (Bearish Signal) BHF, RSI Indicator left the overbought zone on March 16, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a signal that BHF's price could be shifting from an uptrend to a downtrend. Traders may consider selling the stock or exploring put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor looked back and found 21 similar cases where BHF's RSI Indicator left the overbought zone, and in 19 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 90%. Current price $44.99 is above $41.37 the highest resistance line found by Tickeron A.I. Throughout the month of 02/11/21 - 03/16/21, the price experienced a +8% Uptrend. During the week of 03/09/21 - 03/16/21, the stock enjoyed a +2% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/zg21a02z0nn61.png?width=1536&format=png&auto=webp&s=d88f9d0b5336e5fa3a1845d5f4b00d95ae0d4b9c

**Bearish Trend Analysis**

The Stochastic Indicator demonstrated that the ticker has stayed in the overbought zone for 5 days. The longer the ticker stays in the overbought zone, the sooner a price pull-back is expected.

Following a 3-day decline, the stock is projected to fall further. Considering past instances where BHF declined for three days, the price rose further, Tickeron A.I. shows that in 50 of 62 cases within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 74%.

BHF broke above its upper Bollinger Band on March 10, 2021. This could be a sign that the stock is set to drop as the stock moves back below the upper band and toward the middle band. You may want to consider selling the stock or exploring put options.

[Full information about signal here](https://tickeron.com/news/9967366-brighthouse-financial-bhf-43-67-rsi-indicator-left-the-overbought-zone-on-march-16-2021?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=signal)
